training.note: Primary model is upgrade-by-upgrade CombatPower delta. Absolute profile.CombatPower fit is kept only as a reference for sample sanity checks.

loaup.role: cost and DPS-efficiency cross-check; not the primary official CombatPower delta source

lopec.role: primary official CombatPower before-after delta calibration

loalab.role: honing material, probability, and cost cross-check

rejectedReferences.name: 방댕이토실토실
rejectedReferences.reason: Lopec and official API baseline mismatch
